body:
Amara, hope you're having a restful holiday — I know we both swore we'd take the week off, but here I am checking email anyway. I wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about the [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) deal; I've been thinking more about their grid-balancing stack and I think the Series-A valuation is actually defensible given the regulatory tailwinds coming out of FERC in Q1. That said, I'd love a second set of eyes on the technical diligence before we move forward — your team at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has done more battery storage deals than anyone I know on the seed side. Can we carve out an hour in the first week of January to walk through the deck together? Let me know what works and I'll send a hold.

— Nadia
